title: The Next Size Up
subtitle: A journal prompt set for defining what the next level of growth looks like, and what it will make possible to give
excerpt: A journal prompt set from the Day 83 theme of a 12-week money programme. The prompts move from how growth is defined now, to what the next expansion could serve, to the systems that will sustain it without pressure.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 83 journal prompts in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you want to clarify what growth looks like from where you now stand, and anchor the link between your own expansion and what it makes possible for others.

content.text: A journal prompt set from the Day 83 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 83: commit to continued growth and giving. The prompts start with how growth is defined at this point, then move to where the next expansion could serve others, then to what sustains it.
New to journal prompts as practice? Read
How do I define growth now: financially, emotionally, spiritually?
Write the full definition, not just the money number.
What systems or habits will help me sustain expansion without pressure?
Write what is already working and what is still missing.
Where do I feel called to expand next, and how can that growth serve others?
Name the expansion. Name who it reaches.
At the next size up, what will I be able to give that I cannot give now?
Write it specifically. Money, time, attention, access — name which.
What ongoing community or opportunity am I grateful to grow within?
Name it. Write one thing it has given you this year.
Adapted from the Day 83 journal prompts in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
